title: 1 step DFU - Content of the Software Update tab when there is update available only for Earbuds
scenario: Verify the Software Update tab displays Earbuds update details (versions, release notes, Update button) and marks Charge Case as up to date when only an Earbuds update is available.
steps: 2. Check that the Earbuds section shows the current version and available version.
3. Verify that release notes are displayed for the Earbuds update.
4. Confirm that an Update button is shown for the Earbuds.
5. Check that the Charge Case section is marked as 'Up to date'.
expected: Earbuds: current version, available version, release notes, and Update button are displayed. Charge Case is marked as up to date.
